texto: The chance of any species reaching and then surviving on an island as distant as one of the Hawaiian chain is infinitesimal, but despite the extraordinary odds, plants and seeds found their way ashore, carried by the tide or blown by trade winds, inside birds or in their feathers, in the branches of trees and in the jetsam of sunken ships.
explicacao: Citação de Susanna Moore sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The chance of any species reaching and then surviving on an island as distant as one of the Hawai…” articula sucesso, trees, plants em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como plants e birds.

frase_original: The chance of any species reaching and then surviving on an island as distant as one of the Hawaiian chain is infinitesimal, but despite the extraordinary odds, plants and seeds found their way ashore, carried by the tide or blown by trade winds, inside birds or in their feathers, in the branches of trees and in the jetsam of sunken ships.
